---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem are you trying to solve?**
The use case or pain point. "I'm always frustrated when…"

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches or workarounds you've tried or thought about.

**Scope check**
mailtrap-local is a **local-dev / CI** email sandbox — single binary, SQLite,
loopback, no auth/multi-tenancy (see the README's "What it is *not*"). Does this
fit that scope, or is it closer to the hosted [Mailtrap](https://mailtrap.io)
product?

**Anything else?**
Mockups, links, or related issues.
